text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi thanked Russian President Putin for his condolences on the death of Iran’s late Supreme Leader and for his congratulations on the election of the new Supreme Leader, during a meeting in St. Petersburg. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told President Putin that “the whole world has witnessed Iran’s real power in confronting the United States, and it has become clear that the Islamic Republic of Iran is a stable, strong and powerful system.” He added that the recent war proved Iran has great friends and allies like Russia, and thanked Moscow for its support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐在圣彼得堡会晤期间，感谢俄罗斯总统普京对伊朗已故最高领袖逝世表示哀悼，并对其新任最高领袖的当选表示祝贺。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐告诉普京总统，“全世界都见证了伊朗在对抗美国时的真正力量，事实已经证明，伊朗伊斯兰共和国是一个稳定、强大且有力的体系。”他补充说，最近的战争证明伊朗拥有像俄罗斯这样伟大的朋友和盟友，并感谢莫斯科的支持。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi thanked Russian President Putin for his condolences on the death of Iran’s late Supreme Leader and for his congratulations on the election of the new Supreme Leader, during a meeting in St. Petersburg. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐在圣彼得堡会晤期间，感谢俄罗斯总统普京对伊朗已故最高领袖逝世表示哀悼，并对其新任最高领袖的当选表示祝贺。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 i24NEWS: U.S. President Trump will convene a security discussion on Iran today. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt will hold a press conference at 8:00pm this evening. @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Of the 2 million people currently being sought by the TCC, 1.6 million could join the military, according to military ombudsman Reshetilova. "We are currently seeking a way to properly communicate with this part of society, which has distanced itself from defending the state." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 据军事监察员列舍季洛娃称，在目前被乌克兰领土征兵中心（TCC）搜寻的200万人中，有160万人可以参军。“我们目前正在寻找一种与这部分社会群体进行适当沟通的方法，他们已经疏远了保卫国家的工作。”🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Relations between Russia and Iran are strategic partnership relations at the highest level — Abbas Araghchi to Putin 'No matter what is happening, Russian-Iranian relations will grow stronger' 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Reuters reports a wider-than-known Trump administration effort to assert federal DHS control over elections in at least eight states, using investigations, raids, and demands for access to voting systems and private voter data. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048764105373487439/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 路透社报道称，特朗普政府正在进行一项比已知范围更广的努力，试图通过调查、突袭以及要求获取投票系统和私人选民数据等手段，在至少八个州对选举实施联邦国土安全部（DHS）的控制。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048764105373487439/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah plans to use suicide bomber groups against IDF positions in southern Lebanon, per Al Jazeera. This comes as exchanges of fire and ground operations continue despite last week's three-week ceasefire extension. tweet

text: Open Source Intel NEW: Iran has proposed reopening the Strait of Hormuz to the U.S., but only after the war ends with guarantees it won’t resume. Nuclear and maritime talks would follow later. The White House is reviewing the offer ahead of Trump’s national security meeting. Iran is pushing to end the conflict before any nuclear negotiations, amid reported internal divisions in Tehran. Trump officials say he “holds the cards” and will only accept a deal that prevents Iran from getting a nuclear weapon. - Axios tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 最新消息：伊朗已提议向美国重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，但前提是战争结束并获得不会重启战争的保证。核问题和海事谈判将在之后进行。白宫正在特朗普的国家安全会议前审查该提议。据报道，在德黑兰内部存在分歧的情况下，伊朗正推动在任何核谈判之前结束冲突。特朗普的官员表示，他“掌握主动权”，只会接受能阻止伊朗获得核武器的协议。 - Axios 推文

text: Open Source Intel Emirati Advisor Anwar Gargash: “Iran acts as if it is a superpower, even when it does not possess nuclear weapons. Imagine if it possessed those weapons!” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048762043436511619/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Earlier today, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with Russian President Vladimir Putin on increasing coordination between the two countries, as both nations have now supplied each other with drones, most notably Shahed-pattern drones, and intelligence in their respective wars in Europe and the Middle East. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 今天早些时候，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希会见了俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京，讨论加强两国间的协调。目前两国在各自于欧洲和中东的战争中，已经互相提供了无人机（最著名的是见证者系列无人机）和情报。推文

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Russia will do its best to help bring peace to the Middle East , Vladimir Putin said. The Russian head of state praised the Iranian people for the courageous and heroic fight for their sovereignty, saying hopefully they will live through the trying period and there will be peace. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 弗拉基米尔·普京表示，俄罗斯将尽最大努力帮助中东实现和平。这位俄罗斯国家元首称赞伊朗人民为捍卫主权所进行的勇敢而英勇的斗争，并表示希望他们能度过这段艰难时期，迎来和平。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Trump officials are pointing to a drop in food stamp use as a sign of economic progress, but the decline has largely been driven by its policy changes and funding cuts that have since shrunk the SNAP program. (NYT) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048756553067442539/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 特朗普政府官员指出食品券使用量的下降是经济进步的标志，但这种下降在很大程度上是由其政策变化和资金削减所驱动的，这些变化已经缩减了SNAP计划。（纽约时报） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048756553067442539/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) A 5-min footage showing fighters from the Russian "Africa Corps" armed organization and Mali's government troops defending the perimeter of the Modibo Keita International Airport in the capital of Mali, Bamoko, from FLA/JNIM militants during their ongoing offensive. The Russians can be seen employing heavier vehicles, such as BTR-82A APC and BMP-3 IFV, with aerial support provided by a Mil Mi-24 helicopter. In contrast to the city of Kidal in northern Mali, which was captured by the Tuareg rebels, Russian/Malian forces were able to hold the airport. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）一段5分钟的视频显示，俄罗斯“非洲军团”武装组织的战士和马里政府军在马里首都巴马科的莫迪博·凯塔国际机场周边进行防御，抵御FLA/JNIM武装分子正在进行的进攻。可以看到俄罗斯人使用了重型车辆，如BTR-82A装甲运兵车和BMP-3步兵战车，并由米-24直升机提供空中支援。与被图阿雷格叛军占领的马里北部基达尔市不同，俄罗斯/马里联军成功守住了机场。推文

text: Open Source Intel Vladimir Putin: The Iranian people are fighting bravely and heroically for their sovereignty We hope that the Iranian people will overcome this ordeal and that peace will prevail. I conveyed through Mr. Araghchi my best wishes of safety to Leader Khamenei Russia will do everything it can to benefit Iran Iran and Russia intend to continue their strategic relations tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 弗拉基米尔·普京：伊朗人民正在为捍卫主权而勇敢、英勇地战斗。我们希望伊朗人民能够克服这一磨难，和平将会降临。我通过阿拉格齐先生向哈梅内伊领袖转达了我最美好的安全祝愿。俄罗斯将尽其所能造福伊朗。伊朗和俄罗斯打算继续保持其战略关系。推文

text: WarMonitor Patel is bragging about being careless enough to pack the entire line of succession into the same room at the same time, with lower than normal security measures in place. Kash Patel: "Just to remind everyone. This was almost the entirety of the president's cabinet, the president and vice president himself, and 2,000 members of the media. This is something the movies don't even write about, this kind of tragedy." https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2048742033326494193/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 帕特尔（Patel）吹嘘自己粗心大意，将整个继任序列的人员同时安置在同一个房间里，且安保措施低于正常水平。卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）：“提醒大家一下。这几乎是总统内阁的全部成员、总统和副总统本人，以及2000名媒体人员。这是电影里都不会写的悲剧。” https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2048742033326494193/video/1 - 亚伦·鲁帕尔（Aaron Rupar）推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 Friedrich Merz on Iran: 📌 “The problem with conflicts like this is that it’s not just about getting in — you also have to find a way out.” 📌 “We’ve seen how difficult that is over 20 years in Afghanistan, and we saw it in Iraq.” 📌 “An entire nation is being humiliated by the Iranian leadership, especially by the so-called Revolutionary Guards.” Video is made by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇩🇪 🇮🇷 弗里德里希·默茨（Friedrich Merz）谈伊朗：📌 “这类冲突的问题在于，不仅仅是关于如何进入——你还必须找到出路。” 📌 “我们已经看到这在阿富汗20年里是多么困难，在伊拉克我们也看到了。” 📌 “整个国家正受到伊朗领导层，特别是所谓的革命卫队的羞辱。” 视频由grok AI制作 推文

text: 📝 Норвежское производство 📝 для ударов по России Чем дольше идет конфликт, тем более активно страны Европы вкладываются в основной фактор успеха ВСУ – в беспилотники. Теперь к Великобритании и некоторым другим странам присоединилась и Норвегия. Там будет создано первое совместное производство украинских дронов типа mid-strike для ближнего и среднего тыла. Вся продукция, изготовленная в рамках проекта в Норвегии, будет передана на нужды ВСУ. Проект будет профинансирован норвежской стороной, а первые поставки будут к лету 2026 года. 🖍 Конечно, когда в Европе громогласно говорят о том, что они делают такое впервые, они лукавят . Европейские страны активно снабжали и снабжают ВСУ с самого начала конфликта. Просто ранее они это делали, не особо афишируя подробности. 🚩 Сейчас времена изменились, идущий конфликт даёт преимущество для стран Запада испытывать свои наработки напрямую и при этом загружать свои оборонные предприятия контрактами. «Британский опыт» пришелся многим по вкусу. ❗️ Что касается конкретных типов БЛА, то их не называют. Но, скорее всего, речь идёт о беспилотниках типа FP-1/FP-2. На днях в компании-производителе заявили, что будут разработаны новые модификации дронов при поддержке одной из стран Запада. А учитывая то, насколько часто их сейчас применяют, акцент на них будет не удивителен. #БЛА #Норвегия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 挪威制造 📝 用于打击俄罗斯 冲突持续的时间越长，欧洲国家就越积极地投资于乌克兰武装部队成功的核心因素——无人机。现在，继英国和其他一些国家之后，挪威也加入了这一行列。那里将建立第一个联合生产乌克兰中近程“中程打击”（mid-strike）型无人机的工厂。在挪威项目中生产的所有产品都将移交给乌克兰武装部队使用。该项目将由挪威方面资助，首批交付将于2026年夏季进行。 🖍 当然，当欧洲大声疾呼他们是第一次这样做时，他们是在撒谎。欧洲国家从冲突一开始就一直在积极向乌克兰武装部队提供物资。只是以前他们这样做时并没有大肆宣传细节。 🚩 现在时代变了，正在进行的冲突为西方国家提供了直接测试其研发成果并同时用合同填满其国防企业的优势。“英国经验”受到了许多人的青睐。 ❗️ 至于具体的无人机类型，没有提及。但很可能指的是FP-1/FP-2型无人机。几天前，制造商表示将在西方国家之一的支持下开发无人机的新改型。考虑到它们现在的使用频率，重点关注它们并不令人惊讶。 #无人机 #挪威 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ 禅宗 💸 支持我们

text: Open Source Intel FBI Director Kash Patel on the gunman's movements leading up to the WHCD: "We have all of those questions answered, and that's why I wanted to present, with the Attorney General, at the press conference later today, once the magistrate has signed off on the criminal complaint." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048749411438580220/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel FBI局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）谈到枪手在白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）前的行动：“我们已经回答了所有这些问题，这就是为什么我想在今天晚些时候的发布会上，与司法部长一起，在治安法官签署刑事诉状后进行说明。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048749411438580220/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Senate Democrats are pressing the Pentagon over alleged failures to protect U.S. troops from expected Iranian retaliation. Lawmakers say “basic precautions” weren’t taken, pointing to a drone strike in Kuwait that killed six Americans and exposed gaps in base defenses. (ABC) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048749006411686116/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国参议院民主党人正在向五角大楼施压，指责其未能保护美军免受预期的伊朗报复。议员们表示没有采取“基本预防措施”，并指出在科威特发生的一起无人机袭击事件造成六名美国人死亡，暴露了基地防御的漏洞。（ABC） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048749006411686116/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Al Nahar citing the Lebanese army: The Lebanese Army is conducting large-scale raids in the town of Brital, east of Baalbek, following gunfire and the use of B7 rockets during the funeral procession of two Hezbollah members. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Al Nahar援引黎巴嫩军队的话：在两名真主党成员的葬礼游行中发生枪击和使用B7火箭弹事件后，黎巴嫩军队正在巴勒贝克东部的布里塔尔（Brital）镇进行大规模突袭。 @wfwitness

text: Trump will meet with top national security officials to discuss stalled Iran talks after canceling envoy travel to Pakistan. He is weighing next steps, including possibly resuming a paused bombing campaign. Source: CNN
text_zh: 特朗普将与高级国家安全官员会面，讨论陷入僵局的伊朗谈判，此前他取消了特使前往巴基斯坦的行程。他正在权衡下一步行动，包括可能恢复暂停的轰炸行动。来源：CNN

text: White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles will meet this week with Secret Service and Homeland Security leaders to review presidential security. The administration continues to support Secret Service leadership and will assess the response and improve safety measures for future events. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 白宫办公厅主任苏西·怀尔斯（Susie Wiles）本周将与特勤局和国土安全部领导人会面，审查总统安保工作。政府将继续支持特勤局领导层，并将评估应对措施，改善未来活动的安保措施。来源：路透社
